scripts.test: npm run test -w @spike-life/content-core && npm run test -w @spike-life/content-philippines && npm run test -w @spike-life/board-config && npm run test -w @spike-life/domain && npm run test -w @spike-life/ui && npm run test -w @spike-life/application
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @spike-life/content-core && npm run build -w @spike-life/content-philippines && npm run build -w @spike-life/board-config && npm run build -w @spike-life/domain && npm run build -w @spike-life/ui && npm run build -w @spike-life/application && npm run build -w @spike-life/infrastructure
scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && npm run dev -w @spike-life/web
scripts.build:web: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @spike-life/web
